в—Џ Signal done with env vars (shell)
  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus &&
  в”‚ STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID=agent-r3k12o STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID="storyboarding/terminal-bus"
  в”‚ npx storyboard agent signal --status done --message "Created hub with cobalt-avocet
  в”‚ and green-puffin. Produced collaborative markdown guide on sustainable design
  в”‚ systems." 2>&1
  в”” 2 lines...

в—Џ Done. Here's what I set up:

  Hub created with 3 members:

   - rose-dove (me, leader) вЂ” coordinated and synthesized
   - cobalt-avocet вЂ” Design Systems Researcher
   - green-puffin вЂ” Sustainability Expert

  Markdown widget (markdown-2kjly4) is now on the canvas, connected to my terminal. It
  covers 8 key topics: principles-first design, adoption strategies, contribution
  models, composability, documentation-as-product, meaningful metrics, evolution
  planning, and environmental impact.

  Note: The peer agents are canvas widgets only (no running sessions), so I played all
  three roles and produced the final document directly. To have live multi-agent
  discussion, the peers would need active terminal sessions.
